systemic_low_risk_band_equation.strength_term: A_sys_band = mix(S_sys_broad_score, R_sys_broad, 1 - P_sys_broad, M_brain_direct_v30, R_train_v36)
systemic_low_risk_band_equation.learning_term: L_sys_band = mix(L_sys_broad, S_sys_broad_score, D_feature_v30, B_plastic_v36, R_train_v36)
systemic_low_risk_band_equation.system_term: M_sys_band = A_sys_band + S_sys_band + R_sys_band + L_sys_band - P_sys_band

project_readout.summary: systemic low-risk band extension validation checks whether the broader low-risk regime starts extending into a more coherent low-risk band instead of only widening the previous band.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this band extension still survives after it is folded into the next brain direct chain and training bridge.
